Home.heroSubtitle: The voice of Lusophone Africa at the heart of Switzerland.
Home.heroSlogan: A cultura não se explica. Vive-se.
Home.aboutText: BATUKU & CULTURA is an association dedicated to promoting, preserving and spreading the cultural richness of Lusophone African countries through dance, music, gastronomy and art.
Home.batukuText: Our traditional dance and percussion group is the soul of the association. Through the Batuku, a direct heritage from Cape Verde and Afro-Lusophone history, we tell the stories of struggle, joy and resilience of our people.
Home.heritageSubtitle: Explore the unique diversity of the five African countries with Portuguese as their official language.

About.missionText1: To shine a light on the culture of Portuguese-speaking African countries in Switzerland, build intercultural bridges and bring the community together around our living traditions.
About.missionText2: We want every event, every dance, every meal to be a celebration of our plural identity.
About.visionQuote: We believe in a society rich in its diversity. Through our actions, we aim to create a positive impact by strengthening cultural ties, valuing identities and giving a voice to African communities in Switzerland.

Batuku.pageSubtitle: The soul of Santiago, the rhythm of Africa
Batuku.heritageText: Batuku is much more than a dance or music. It is the story of Cape Verdean resilience, born from imposed silence and transformed into a cry for freedom.
Batuku.timeline1Text: Born on the island of Santiago in Cape Verde, Batuku was practiced in secret by enslaved people to express their pain and communicate.
Batuku.timeline2Text: Long banned by the Portuguese colonial administration and the Church for being too subversive and African, it survived underground.
Batuku.timeline3Text: A living heritage of Cape Verde, Batuku is today carried forward by committed women who share this collective memory with the world.
Batuku.workshopText: Want to learn Batuku? Our workshops are open to everyone, beginners and advanced alike. Come and feel the rhythm with us.

Culture.pageSubtitle: 5 countries, 5 stories, one language, one energy

Events.featuredText: The largest gathering of Lusophone cultures in Switzerland. A day of music, dance, gastronomy and sharing.

Gallery.pageSubtitle: Relive the best moments from our past events, workshops and vibrant cultural gatherings.

Contact.joinText: Become a member of the Batuku & Cultura association and actively participate in our events and workshops.
Contact.formSubtitle: We will get back to you as soon as possible.

Footer.description: Celebrating and promoting the cultures of Portuguese-Speaking African Countries (PALOPs).
Footer.foundedIn: Founded November 2025 · Canton of Vaud, Switzerland
